RTransform2D Scale a two-dimensional figure by the x and y factor provided by the user. If accumulate is set to true, any changes to the scale will be be relative to the figure's current size. Otherwise, the scaling factor specified will b

Otherwise, the scaling factor specified will be relative to the original size of the figure. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: Scale2D.java,v 1.10 2004/04/13 05:12:44 cxh Exp $ Author: Ismael M. Sarmiento, Steve Neuendorffer See Also: Serial
